boundary_binding.action_boundary: May HR or payroll execute the requested workforce, pay, benefits, or employment-status action? Focus: retro-pay adjustment inside signed compensation change order.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Source records fail to close boundary
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Exact signed comp order match missing
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: signed comp order amount employee pay period match

critical_features_preserved: signed comp order amount, employee, and pay period match
final_answer: Action may not proceed. SRC-568E044EFAE0-CTL shows signed comp order amount, employee, and pay period match is missing or mismatched for retro-pay adjustment. Policy SRC-568E044EFAE0-POL requires exact source closure before execution. Escalate to resolve dependency.
open_blockers: signed comp order amount employee pay period match
